summary: Entrance hall to a modern, high-specification apartment, finished with emulsioned walls in white and grey/taupe tones, white-painted moulded skirting, oak-effect engineered/laminate flooring and a walnut-veneered solid entrance door with bronze ironmongery. The space includes a built-in storage cupboard with hanging rail and a smart home control panel. Overall decoratively presented to a good standard with isolated light scuffs and marks to walls and a noticeable build-up of dust/debris on the cupboard shelf requiring cleaning.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth plastered and emulsioned ceiling in white, incorporating recessed LED downlights and a ceiling-mounted smoke detector.

items.name: Walls - white emulsion
items.description: Smooth plastered walls finished in white emulsion to hallway and storage recesses.
defects: Scattered light scuff/pencil-type marks to wall above socket (P061)
Light scuff marks to wall near control panel (P068)

items.name: Walls - grey/taupe emulsion
items.description: Smooth plastered feature walls finished in grey/taupe emulsion.
defects: Diffuse scuff/smudge marks to centre of wall (P070)
Scattered grey marks/scuffs to wall around control panel (P069)

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White-painted moulded timber skirting throughout hallway and recesses.

items.name: Flooring - engineered oak-effect
items.description: Pale oak-effect engineered/laminate plank flooring laid throughout hallway in a linear pattern.
defects: Shadow/scuff marks visible to surface near door (P063)

items.name: Threshold strip - marble effect
items.description: Marble-effect tiled/transition threshold strip between hallway flooring and adjoining carpeted room, with metal trim edge.

items.name: Carpet - adjoining threshold
items.description: Grey/beige fleck loop-pile carpet visible at threshold to adjoining room.

items.name: Entrance door
items.description: Solid walnut-veneered entrance door with vertical grain, fitted with bronze-finish lever handle, euro-cylinder lock, thumbturn and a bronze-finish letterplate; framed by white-painted architrave.
defects: Light superficial mark to handle backplate (P075)

items.name: Door ironmongery - bronze
items.description: Bronze-finish lever door handle, escutcheon, thumbturn lock and letterplate to entrance door.

items.name: Internal door
items.description: Walnut-veneered internal door visible at end of hallway with white-painted frame, matching entrance door finish.

items.name: Double socket - bronze (low level)
items.description: Bronze-finish twin 13A switched socket outlet, low-level mounting.

items.name: Light switch bank - polished chrome
items.description: Polished chrome/black nickel switch plates comprising a four-gang switch and single switch plate.

items.name: Smart home control panel
items.description: Wall-mounted touchscreen smart home/heating control panel with black surround, recessed flush to wall, displaying user settings interface.

items.name: Recessed LED downlights
items.description: Recessed circular LED ceiling downlights to hallway.

items.name: Built-in storage cupboard
items.description: Built-in utility/storage cupboard with white-painted carcass, walnut-effect shelf, LED strip lighting and loft/riser access hatch to ceiling; white moulded door frame.
defects: Build-up of dust and debris/grit to top of base shelf (P086)

items.name: Clothes hangers
items.description: Grey/black plastic clothes hangers suspended on rail within storage cupboard.

items.name: Riser/loft access hatch
items.description: Flush ceiling access hatch within storage cupboard recess, painted finish.
